appliedProposals.rationale: cut hedge quota -25% (sized to the bleed → reallocates to ceiling/roi)
appliedProposals.evidence: hedge slice real ROI -79% (net -$126) over 162 entries

appliedProposals.rationale: cut anti-chalk quota -25% (sized to the bleed → reallocates to ceiling/roi)
appliedProposals.evidence: anti-chalk slice real ROI -79% (net -$59) over 75 entries

appliedProposals.rationale: Bonus for stacking hitters against a TOP-3 owned pitcher — fires ONLY on the slate sizes where it recurs (>20% of winning stacks; e.g. small slates, not main/large).
appliedProposals.evidence: Winners stack-vs-top3-pitcher: global 8% (per-slate-size in the DNA table — it recurs most on small slates)
